name: get_irs_industry_tax_statistics

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp-public?vertical=intelligence" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_cac_benchmark, get_osha_enforcement · Public sink: get_market_structure_signal, get_sector_ai_intelligence, get_saas_market_intelligence, get_investment_category_signal, get_osha_enforcement · Destructive: get_macro_market_signal.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_cac_benchmark, get_osha_enforcement · Public sink: get_market_structure_signal, get_sector_ai_intelligence, get_saas_market_intelligence, get_investment_category_signal, get_osha_enforcement · Destructive: get_macro_market_signal

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
